prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, generate variants of DNA-directed RNA polymerase subunit beta (RpoB) (bacterial RNA polymerase (rifampicin resistance target)) from Mycobacterium tuberculosis with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. specify a computational protocol covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using RoseTTAFold, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: DNA-directed RNA polymerase subunit beta (RpoB); organism: Mycobacterium tuberculosis; catalogue version v1.0
